briefdescription.para: The basic BigDigit element, an unsigned 32-bit integer.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], const u32 u[], const u32 v[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpAdd

briefdescription.para: Computes w = u + v, returns carry.

detaileddescription.para: Add two multi-precision integers.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the sum
Number of digits in the integers

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], const u32 u[], const u32 v[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSubtract

briefdescription.para: Computes w = u - v, returns borrow.

detaileddescription.para: Subtract two multi-precision integers.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the result (u - v)
Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para: Borrow value (0 if no borrow, non-zero otherwise)

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], const u32 u[], const u32 v[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpMultiply

briefdescription.para: Computes w = u * v.

detaileddescription.para: Multiply two multi-precision integers.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the result (u - v)
Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para: Borrow value (0 if no borrow, non-zero otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 q[], u32 r[], const u32 u[], size_t udigits, u32 v[], size_t vdigits)
memberdef.name: mpDivide

briefdescription.para: Performs integer division: u = q*v + r.

parameterdescription.para: Size of q, r, and u arrays

simplesect.para: q and r are overwritten without preservation

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 r[], const u32 u[], size_t udigits, u32 v[], size_t vdigits)
memberdef.name: mpModulo

briefdescription.para: Computes remainder r = u mod v.

parameterdescription.para: Size of r and v arrays

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], const u32 x[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSquare

briefdescription.para: Computes the square of a big digit number.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the result (size: 2 * ndigits)
Input array to be squared (size: ndigits)
Number of digits in input array

simplesect.para: Overflow value from the squaring operation

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 s[], const u32 x[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSqrt

briefdescription.para: Computes integer square root s = floor(sqrt(x))

detaileddescription.para: Computes the square root of a multi-precision integer.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the square root result
Input array containing the value to compute square root of
Number of digits in the multi-precision integer

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 s[], const u32 x[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpCubeRoot

briefdescription.para: Computes integer cube root s = floor(cuberoot(x))

detaileddescription.para: Computes the cube root of a multi-precision integer.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the cube root result
Input array containing the value to compute cube root of
Number of digits in the multi-precision integer

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpEqual

briefdescription.para: Returns true if a == b, else false, using constant-time algorithm.

detaileddescription.para:
Constant-time with respect to ndigits Compares two multi-precision integers for equality.
a
Pointer to first multi-precision integer array
b
Pointer to second multi-precision integer array
ndigits
Number of digits to compare
Non-zero if equal, zero if not equal Returns true if a == b, else false, using constant-time algorithm.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpCompare

briefdescription.para: Returns sign of (a-b) as {-1,0,+1} using constant-time algorithm.

detaileddescription.para:
Constant-time with respect to ndigits Compares two multi-precision integers.
a
First multi-precision integer array
b
Second multi-precision integer array
ndigits
Number of digits to compare
-1 if a < b, 0 if a == b, +1 if a > b Returns sign of (a-b) as {-1,0,+1} using constant-time algorithm.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpIsZero

briefdescription.para: Returns true if a is zero, else false, using constant-time algorithm.

detaileddescription.para:
Constant-time with respect to ndigits Checks if a multi-precision integer is zero.
a
Multi-precision integer array to check
ndigits
Number of digits in the array
Non-zero if a is zero, zero otherwise Returns true if a is zero, else false, using constant-time algorithm.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpEqual_q

briefdescription.para: Returns true if a == b, else false (quick)

detaileddescription.para:
Not constant-time. Compares two multi-precision integers for equality.
a
Pointer to the first multi-precision integer array.
b
Pointer to the second multi-precision integer array.
ndigits
Number of digits to compare.
Non-zero if equal, 0 if not equal. Returns true if a == b, else false (quick)
Not constant-time.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpCompare_q

briefdescription.para: Returns sign of (a-b) as {-1,0,+1} (quick)

detaileddescription.para:
Not constant-time. Compares two multi-precision integers (quick version).
a
First multi-precision integer array
b
Second multi-precision integer array
ndigits
Number of digits to compare
-1 if a < b, 0 if a == b, +1 if a > b Returns sign of (a-b) as {-1,0,+1} (quick)
Not constant-time.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpIsZero_q

briefdescription.para: Checks if a multi-precision integer is zero (quick version).

detaileddescription.para:
a
Multi-precision integer array to check
ndigits
Number of digits in the array
Non-zero if a is zero, zero otherwise Checks if a multi-precision integer is zero (quick version).
Not constant-time.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 y[], const u32 x[], const u32 e[], u32 m[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpModExp

briefdescription.para: Computes modular exponentiation y = x^e mod m.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the result
Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 yout[], const u32 x[], const u32 e[], u32 m[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpModExp_ct

briefdescription.para: Computes modular exponentiation y = x^e mod m in constant time.

detaileddescription.para:
yout
Output array to store the result
x
Base array
e
Exponent array
m
Modulus array
ndigits
Number of digits in the arrays
Status code indicating success or failure
Resistant to simple power analysis attack on private exponent. Slower than mpModExp(). Computes modular exponentiation y = x^e mod m in constant time.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 x[], const u32 y[], u32 m[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpModMult

briefdescription.para: Computes modular multiplication a = (x * y) mod m.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the result
Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 inv[], const u32 u[], const u32 m[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpModInv

briefdescription.para: Computes the modular multiplicative inverse inv = u^{-1} mod m.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the inverse
Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 g[], const u32 x[], const u32 y[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpGcd

briefdescription.para: Computes the greatest common divisor g = gcd(x, y)

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the GCD
Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], const u32 n[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpJacobi

briefdescription.para: Computes the Jacobi symbol (a/n)

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in the arrays

simplesect.para:
If n is prime then the Jacobi symbol becomes the Legendre symbol (a/p) defined to be
(a/p) = +1 if a is a quadratic residue modulo p
(a/p) = -1 if a is a quadratic non-residue modulo p
(a/p) = 0 if a is divisible by p

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpBitLength

briefdescription.para: Returns number of significant bits in a.

detaileddescription.para: Returns number of significant bits in a

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in the array

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t x, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShiftLeft

briefdescription.para: Computes a = b << x (shift left)

parameterdescription.para: Number of bits to shift left

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t x, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShiftRight

briefdescription.para: Computes a = b >> x (shift right)

parameterdescription.para: Number of bits to shift right

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], const u32 c[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpXorBits

briefdescription.para: Computes bitwise a = b XOR c.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], const u32 c[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpOrBits

briefdescription.para: Computes bitwise a = b OR c.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], const u32 c[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpAndBits

briefdescription.para: Computes bitwise a = b AND c.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpNotBits

briefdescription.para: Computes bitwise a = NOT b.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], size_t ndigits, size_t L)
memberdef.name: mpModPowerOf2

briefdescription.para: Computes a = a mod 2^L (clears all bits greater than L)

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], size_t ndigits, size_t n, int value)
memberdef.name: mpSetBit

briefdescription.para: Sets bit n of a with specified value.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], size_t ndigits, size_t n)
memberdef.name: mpGetBit

briefdescription.para: Returns value of bit n.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSetZero

briefdescription.para: Sets a multi-precision integer to zero.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSetDigit

briefdescription.para: Sets a multi-precision integer to a single digit value.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], const u32 b[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSetEqual

briefdescription.para: Copies one multi-precision integer to another.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpSizeof

briefdescription.para: Returns number of significant non-zero digits in a.

detaileddescription.para:
a
Multi-precision integer array
ndigits
Number of digits in the array
Number of significant non-zero digits Returns number of significant non-zero digits in a.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], size_t ndigits, size_t t)
memberdef.name: mpIsPrime

briefdescription.para: Returns true (1) if w is probably prime.

parameterdescription.para: The count of Rabin-Miller primality tests to carry out (recommended at least 80)

simplesect.para: True (1) if w is probably prime otherwise false (0)
Uses FIPS-186-2/Rabin-Miller with trial division by small primes, which is faster in most cases than mpRabinMiller().

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], size_t ndigits, size_t t)
memberdef.name: mpRabinMiller

briefdescription.para: Returns true (1) if w is probably prime using just the Rabin-Miller test.

parameterdescription.para: The count of Rabin-Miller primality tests to carry out

simplesect.para: True (1) if w is probably prime otherwise false (0)

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], const u32 u[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShortAdd

briefdescription.para: Computes w = u + d.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 w[], const u32 u[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShortSub

briefdescription.para: Computes w = u - d.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 p[], const u32 x[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShortMult

briefdescription.para: Computes product p = x * d.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 q[], const u32 u[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShortDiv

briefdescription.para: Computes quotient q = u / d.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShortMod

briefdescription.para: Computes remainder r = a mod d.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], u32 d, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpShortCmp

briefdescription.para: Compares multi-precision integer with single digit.

detaileddescription.para:
a
Multi-precision integer array
d
Single digit to compare
ndigits
Number of digits in array
-1 if a < d, 0 if a == d, +1 if a > d Compares multi-precision integer with single digit.

briefdescription.para: Computes product of two single digits: p = x * y.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the product (size: 2)

simplesect.para: Status code indicating success or failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 *q, u32 *r, const u32 u[2], u32 v)
memberdef.name: spDivide

briefdescription.para: Computes quotient and remainder: q = u / v, r = u % v.

parameterdescription.para: Output pointer to store the quotient (single digit)
Output pointer to store the remainder (single digit)

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 lower, u32 upper)
memberdef.name: spSimpleRand

briefdescription.para: Returns a simple pseudo-random digit between lower and upper.

simplesect.para: spBetterRand() Returns a simple pseudo-random digit between lower and upper
Random digit value between lower and upper

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], size_t ndigits, size_t nbits)
memberdef.name: mpQuickRandBits

briefdescription.para: Generate a quick-and-dirty random mp number a of bit length at most nbits using plain-old-rand.

detaileddescription.para:
a
Output array to store random number
ndigits
Number of digits in array
nbits
Maximum bit length of random number
Actual number of significant digits set
Not crypto secure.
mpRandomBits() Generate a quick-and-dirty random mp number a of bit length at most nbits using plain-old-rand.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *prefix, const u32 *p, size_t ndigits, const char *suffix)
memberdef.name: mpPrintHex

briefdescription.para: Print multi-precision integer in hexadecimal format.

parameterdescription.para: String to print before the number (can be NULL)
Number of digits in the array
String to print after the number (can be NULL)

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 *p, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpPrint

briefdescription.para: Print all digits in hexadecimal including leading zeros.

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in the array

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 *p, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpPrintNL

briefdescription.para: Print all digits in hexadecimal with newlines.

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in the array

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 *p, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpPrintTrim

briefdescription.para: Print in hexadecimal but trim leading zero digits.

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in the array

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 *p, size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpPrintTrimNL

briefdescription.para: Print in hexadecimal, trim leading zeros, and add newlines.

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in the array

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 a[], size_t ndigits, const unsigned char *c, size_t nbytes)
memberdef.name: mpConvFromOctets

briefdescription.para: Converts array of octets to multi-precision integer.

parameterdescription.para: Output array to store the converted number
Input array of octets (bytes) in big-endian order
Number of bytes in the input array

simplesect.para: Actual number of digits set in output array

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 a[], size_t ndigits, unsigned char *c, size_t nbytes)
memberdef.name: mpConvToOctets

briefdescription.para: Converts multi-precision integer to array of octets.

parameterdescription.para: Number of digits in input array
Output array to store octets (bytes) in big-endian order
Size of output array (will pad or truncate as needed)

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 x[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpIsNegative

briefdescription.para: Returns true (1) if x < 0, else false (0)

detaileddescription.para:
x
Multi-precision integer array to check
ndigits
Number of digits in the array
1 if x is negative, 0 otherwise
Expects a negative number to be stored in two's-complement representation. Returns true (1) if x < 0, else false (0)

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 x[], const u32 y[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpChs

briefdescription.para: Sets x = -y (negation)

detaileddescription.para:
x
Output array to store the negated result
y
Input array to negate
ndigits
Number of digits in the arrays
Status code indicating success or failure
Expects a negative number to be stored in two's-complement representation. Sets x = -y (negation)

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 x[], const u32 y[], size_t ndigits)
memberdef.name: mpAbs

briefdescription.para: Sets x = |y|, the absolute value of y.

detaileddescription.para:
x
Output array to store the absolute value
y
Input array
ndigits
Number of digits in the arrays
Status code indicating success or failure
Expects a negative number to be stored in two's-complement representation.
0 if y >= 0, 1 if y < 0 Sets x = |y|, the absolute value of y.

memberdef.argsstring: (void)
memberdef.name: mpVersion

briefdescription.para: Returns version number = major*1000+minor*100+release*10+PP_OPTIONS.

detaileddescription.para: Returns version number = major*1000+minor*100+release*10+PP_OPTIONS

Version number encoded as integer
Version number = major*1000+minor*100+release*10+uses_asm(0|1)+uses_64(0|2)+uses_noalloc(0|5) E.g. Version 2.3.0 will return 230x where x denotes the preprocessor options x | USE_SPASM | USE_64WITH32 | NO_ALLOCS
0 No No No 1 Yes No No 2 No Yes No 3 Yes Yes* No 5 No No Yes 6 Yes No Yes 7 No Yes Yes 8 Yes Yes* Yes

listitem.para: USE_SPASM will take precedence over USE_64WITH32.

briefdescription.para: Interface to core BigDigits "mp" functions using fixed-length arrays.
